resources.string:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 5, 2026

Username Generator by FixThatApp

This app processes all data entirely on your device. No data is stored, transmitted, or collected by us.

Data Collection:
We do not collect any personal data. The app works completely offline.

Advertising:
This app uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect device identifiers and usage data to serve relevant ads. You can learn more at https://policies.google.com/privacy

Third-Party Services:
• Google AdMob (advertising)

Children's Privacy:
This app is not intended for children under 13.

Contact:
For questions, contact us at sufyankhan65@gmail.com

Publisher: FixThatApp
Website: www.fixthatapp.com
